message.content:
{
  "page_type": "other",
  "summary": "This is the cover page of a YORK YBWC water-cooled screw chiller installation, operation, and maintenance manual. It features the YORK logo, the manual title, model range (YBWC80SC50A to YBWC240SC50A), a photograph of the chiller unit, and a safety warning about pressurized refrigerant.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "logo", "label": "YORK logo"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Manual title and version info"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Model range text"},
    {"type": "equipment_image", "label": "YBWC water-cooled screw chiller unit"},
    {"type": "warning_box", "label": "Safety warning about pressurized refrigerant"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["equipment_identification", "manual_documentation", "safety_warnings"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "YORK\nYBWC水冷螺杆式冷水机组\n安装、操作和维护手册\n替代版本:0405\nSC-E21.IOM-WX(0905)\nYBWC80SC50A~YBWC240SC50A\n警告\n系统内充注了一定压力的制冷剂\n对系统进行维护时，如果操作程序不正确，可能严重损伤系统，所有维护工作必须由约克维修技术人员按照约克的安装、操作维护手册来进行。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is a cover page, not a technical diagram or table. No specific component relationships or wiring details are visible.",
  "confidence": 1.0
}

parsed.summary: This is the cover page of a YORK YBWC water-cooled screw chiller installation, operation, and maintenance manual. It features the YORK logo, the manual title, model range (YBWC80SC50A to YBWC240SC50A), a photograph of the chiller unit, and a safety warning about pressurized refrigerant.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
YORK
YBWC水冷螺杆式冷水机组
安装、操作和维护手册
替代版本:0405
SC-E21.IOM-WX(0905)
YBWC80SC50A~YBWC240SC50A
警告
系统内充注了一定压力的制冷剂
对系统进行维护时，如果操作程序不正确，可能严重损伤系统，所有维护工作必须由约克维修技术人员按照约克的安装、操作维护手册来进行。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page is a cover page, not a technical diagram or table. No specific component relationships or wiring details are visible.
